query:
SELECT 'receipts' as tbl, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM receipts
UNION ALL SELECT 'line_receipts', COUNT(*) FROM line_receipts
UNION ALL SELECT 'point_requests', COUNT(*) FROM point_requests
UNION ALL SELECT 'receipt_review_logs', COUNT(*) FROM receipt_review_logs
UNION ALL SELECT 'tiktok_commission_orders', COUNT(*) FROM tiktok_commission_orders;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ViCMbGRGvoSuVwV.root --database GgA9WvTBCZMf6mjyMMwACw --execute SELECT 'receipts' as tbl, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM receipts
UNION ALL SELECT 'line_receipts', COUNT(*) FROM line_receipts
UNION ALL SELECT 'point_requests', COUNT(*) FROM point_requests
UNION ALL SELECT 'receipt_review_logs', COUNT(*) FROM receipt_review_logs
UNION ALL SELECT 'tiktok_commission_orders', COUNT(*) FROM tiktok_commission_orders;
